onboardingBulkBody: Set up one lot for sealed inventory. We will guide you through the minimum cost fields and show the summary as soon as the setup is ready.
onboardingBulkSummary: Bulk lots are the fastest way to get started when you track boxes, items, or cases.
onboardingIntroBody: Choose the path that matches how you sell today. You can always create another lot later.
onboardingIntroTitle: Let's get your first lot set up
onboardingSinglesBody: Set up one singles lot and learn where purchases and inventory live before you add more items.
onboardingSinglesSummary: Singles lots work best when you start with a small inventory list and add purchases as you go.
onboardingTourBulkConfigBody: These are the minimum setup fields for a bulk lot. Start with your purchase cost, how many boxes you bought, and how many items are in each box.
onboardingTourBulkSummaryBody: This summary updates from your config and gives you a quick read on cost per box and cost per item.
onboardingTourBulkSummaryTitle: Watch the summary as you adjust
onboardingTourCreateLotActionBody: Name your lot, confirm the type you chose, and create it. The tour will continue automatically in Config.
onboardingTourCreateLotActionTitle: Create the lot when you're ready
onboardingTourCreateLotBody: Give this lot a name you will recognize later. The app will take you straight into the setup flow after creation.
onboardingTourDoneBody: Your first lot is ready. You can keep adjusting the setup now, or come back here later and the app will keep your progress.
onboardingTourSinglesAddBody: Use this add button whenever you want to capture a new singles purchase. Start small and build the list as inventory comes in.
onboardingTourSinglesAddTitle: Add your first singles purchase here
onboardingTourSinglesPurchasingBody: This section is where singles inventory starts. Track each purchase row here so sales, cost basis, and market value make sense later.
onboardingTourSinglesPurchasingTitle: This is your singles inventory home
